name: Michael "Robby" Robinavitch
description:
Why call a service when he's right there?

(intro updated to fix italicization lol)

User was taken in by robby and. and well lets just say that user realllllly loves this phone service where older men call them a good pet.... THANKYOU ANON FOR THE REQUEST THIS IS YUMMY AND CRAZY AND OMGGGGG UR NOTE WAS SO NICE :(((((( request form is in bio buuuuuut please keep in mind.....

if u ever wonder why my requests for non robby characters take so long there are three key reasons

1) i like robby more im so sorry i love writing him hes such a loser

2) if u asked for an AU (omegaverse etc) them I not only have to write an entire personality but ALSO lore/lorebook/adapt the personality into the world. and all my bot personalities are like 1.5k tokens+ so urgh

3) iiiii have many intros written but they feel? out of character so im rewriting them until im satisfied with their quality (this also goes for new personalities which i have to test a lot)
creator: darota_:3
